summary: Plan-only classification for openclaw/openclaw cluster gitcrawl-223-bulk-plan-20260615-a. #91893 remains the live canonical issue for the live-test ENOSPC bug. #91907 is quarantined because the job explicitly identifies it as a security-signal ref requiring route_security. #92570 is related to the same root cause but should remain open because it is useful contributor code with unresolved ClawSweeper review/re-review failure and no merge/fix authority in this job.

actions.reason: #91893 is the open source report for the root cause and remains the correct canonical issue.
The job gives an explicit per-ref security routing instruction for #91907, so the worker must quarantine this item and continue classifying unrelated refs.
#92570 targets the same root cause as #91893, but unresolved review failure and blocked merge/fix authority make non-mutating related classification the safe plan.
